description: Creates a parallel line or vector through a point in 3D space
utility: Draw a parallel copy of a line/vector passing through a specified point

arguments.name: vector_or_line
arguments.description: The reference vector or line to make parallel

arguments.name: point
arguments.description: The point the parallel should pass through

alternates.description: Create parallel with custom length instead of reference length
Specify the point using x, y, z coordinates instead of point3d
